title: Rename T1000-E bridge fragment canonically
description: seeed_t1000e does not auto-merge for canonical target t1000_e/nrf52840. Rename or replace the fragment with the correct HWMv2 target-qualified stem and verify actual merge behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical t1000_e/nrf52840 bridge build demonstrably consumes the intended conf/overlay, static checks reject the stale alias, and runtime validation is linked.
